_comment: Source URLs for this skill's reference files. Run scripts/update-references.py to refresh.

references/config-schema.md.covers: config.json (trusted_folders), CLI permission flags (tools/paths/URLs), authentication, BYOK models, environment variables, interactive slash commands

references/mcp.md.covers: mcp-config.json structure, transport types (local/http/sse), fields, CLI management commands (/mcp add/show/edit/delete)

references/hooks.md.covers: hooks.json structure, all hook events, command fields, script requirements, exit codes, debugging

references/skills.md.covers: SKILL.md frontmatter fields, storage locations (global vs project), CLI management commands (/skills), allowed-tools, activation

references/instructions.md.covers: Instruction file locations, format, applyTo glob, excludeAgent, how files combine, AGENTS.md vs copilot-instructions.md
